column1: Oz GFS continues to bring Tropical Storm Debby (to be) close to the coastline Sunday am. Other models more offshore. It won't have a ton of time to develop, but if this is accurate,  expect some squally weather late Saturday and into Sunday morning. We should know track by Friday am once the center forms. As always, we'll be updating 24/7.
Will there be storm surge flooding?
ugh, Idalia flooded us terribly. Hudson beach
Denis Phillips you are talking storm hitting this Sunday, correct? Not a week from Sunday?
you have one day to get ready. THIS Sunday
Denis Phillips, how many inches of rain at worst do you think (Morriston/Ocala)
